metadata.source: Cross-referenced from multiple sources: JLPTsensei.com, EJable.com, Tanos.co.uk, KanjiKana.com, Nihongo-Career.com, JapaneseTest4You.com
metadata.catatan: 370 kanji for JLPT N3 (excluding lower levels). Kanji data, readings, and meanings cross-referenced from at least 3 sources. Example vocabulary compiled with English meanings.

kanji_list.meaning: to visit a shrine, to participate

kanji_list.kunyomi: ただ（ちに）、なお（す）、なお（る）
つめ（たい）、ひ（える）、さ（める）

kanji_list.meaning: to pull out, to pass through

kanji_list.kunyomi: しあわ（せ）、さち、さいわ（い）
